word: H1672 - דָּאַג - dâʼag - daw-ag' - Be afraid

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּאג

Transliteration: dâ'ag

Phonetic: daw-ag'

BDB Definition:

  1. to fear, be anxious, be concerned, be afraid, be careful
    1. (Qal)
      1. to be anxious, be concerned
      2. to fear, dread

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 393

Part(s) of speech: Verb
